title: Casing-Log Validity: In-Distribution vs Length-OOD Generalization
strategies: trivial: predict every log VALID (constant) -> baseline calibration
greedy: threshold the spurious `length` cue -> aces ID, collapses to chance on length-OOD
strong: length/order-invariant structural rule (abs_balance==0 AND max_depth<=Dmax) -> transfers to OOD
